channel.title: LandMatch Mock Feed
channel.description: Mock feed for testing the ingest pipeline

item.title: 40 Acres - Rural Homestead in Benton County, OR
item.description: Beautiful 40 acre parcel perfect for homesteading. Rolling hills, year-round creek. $125,000. Benton County, Oregon.

item.title: 160 Acres Ranch Land - Elko County, NV
item.description: Large 160 acre ranch property with well and fencing. Great for cattle or off-grid living. $89,000. Elko County, Nevada.

item.title: 10 Acres Wooded Retreat - Washington County, VT
item.description: Secluded 10 acre wooded lot with southern exposure. Road access, power at lot line. $45,000. Washington County, Vermont.

item.title: 80 Acres Farmland - Polk County, MO
item.description: Productive 80 acre farm with 60 acres tillable. Barn, pond, fenced pasture. $275,000. Polk County, Missouri.

item.title: 5 Acres Mountain View - Garfield County, CO
item.description: Stunning 5 acre mountain lot with panoramic views. Well permit approved. $15,000. Garfield County, Colorado.

item.title: 200 Acres Timber - Iron County, MI
item.description: 200 acres of mature hardwood timber. Excellent hunting, two creeks. $500,000. Iron County, Michigan.

item.title: 25 Acres Off-Grid - Taos County, NM
item.description: 25 acres in off-grid community. Solar-ready, shared well access. Adobe-friendly soil. $38,000. Taos County, New Mexico.

item.title: 120 Acres Mixed Use - Franklin County, TN
item.description: 120 acres with creek frontage, mix of pasture and woods. Old farmhouse needs work. $185,000. Franklin County, Tennessee.

item.title: 15 Acres - Clearwater County, ID
item.description: 15 acres with river access. No price listed yet — contact seller. Clearwater County, Idaho.

item.title: 50 Acres Prairie - Cloud County, KS
item.description: Flat 50 acres of native prairie. Great for small farm or homestead. $72,500. Cloud County, Kansas. Acreage unverified.
